faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: The questions we hear most often from teams considering outsourced development.

items.q: What kind of development does Evergreen Dev do?
items.a: Evergreen Dev provides full-stack outsourced development across web applications, mobile apps (iOS and Android), and backend servers. We cover the entire process, from planning and design through development, deployment, and maintenance.

items.q: Which tech stack do you use?
items.a: We build web applications with React, Next.js, Vue, and Nuxt; mobile apps with Flutter and React Native for cross-platform, or Kotlin and Swift for native. Backends are built on Node.js, Java, and Python.

Timelines depend on project scope. A typical web or app project takes 2-3 weeks for consultation and planning, and 4-8 weeks for development and QA. We provide an exact schedule and milestones after analyzing requirements.

items.q: Do you provide maintenance after launch?
items.a: Yes. After launch we hand over the code and documentation and continue to support feature enhancements and maintenance. Long-term partnership engagements are available.

items.q: How does the collaboration process work?
items.a: We work in four stages: consultation, planning and estimation, agile sprint development with weekly demo reviews, and handover. Progress is shared transparently through regular reviews.

items.q: How can I request a consultation or quote?
items.a: You can reach us through the website contact form, email (ben{'@'}evegdev.com), Channel Talk live chat, or by booking a video meeting. Share your requirements and we will provide a tailored quote.

hero.slogan: Not the build-it-and-leave kind of agency.
hero.sloganSub: We stay through planning, development, deployment, and operations — a technology partner that sticks around as your business grows.

story.lead1: Many companies want to build great products,
story.lead2: but don't know where to begin.
story.block1a: Too many teams are left with polished decks and half-built prototypes,
story.block2b: There's no longer room for the unfinished or the delayed.
story.quoteMain: Building it right — that's the answer.
story.quoteSub: Good software isn't a cost. It's an asset that drives business growth.
story.turnPre: And Evergreen proves that answer with
story.proof: From planning to launch — and through the growth that follows.
story.closing1: We don't simply take on outsourcing.
story.closing2: We become the technology partner for your next decade of growth.

projects.title: Featured Works
projects.ndaNotice: Due to NDA (Non-Disclosure Agreement), the client name and actual service screenshots cannot be disclosed. This page focuses on key features and technology stack.

cta.title: Interested in building something similar?
cta.description: Let's discuss how we can help your business grow.

uri-china.description: Chinese Learning + 1-on-1 Video Lessons + AI Pronunciation & Conversation Platform
uri-china.details: Uri China is a mobile learning platform that matches Chinese language learners with native instructors for 1-on-1 video lessons, combining iFlyTek AI pronunciation assessment with OpenAI ChatGPT-powered conversation practice. Built with Flutter for the app, NestJS for the backend, and Vue for the admin dashboard, with Toss Payments integration.

learning.title: Chinese Learning System
items: Structured level-based content with progress tracking system
Instant learning feedback via visualized AI pronunciation assessment

video_call.title: 1-on-1 Video Lessons
items: Reliable real-time video calls integrated via Agora SDK
Automated scheduling and Toss Payments billing with native instructors

ai_conversation.title: AI Conversation Practice
items: Natural Chinese conversation simulation powered by OpenAI ChatGPT
Real-time pronunciation accuracy feedback via iFlyTek API

pozo.description: F&B O2O Ordering, Operations & Settlement Platform
pozo.details: POZO is a three-sided F&B O2O platform comprising a consumer app, store management app, and back-office system. It integrates the entire order-to-settlement workflow including pickup ordering, PG payment processing, automated settlement, and refund handling into a single unified system. This project demonstrates end-to-end e-commerce/O2O domain capabilities, delivering both operational efficiency for merchants and seamless convenience for consumers.

ordering.title: Consumer Ordering System
items: Store Discovery: Location-based store search with map and list view options
Quick Order & Payment: Instant order processing with PG-integrated payment and estimated pickup time

operations.title: Store Operations Management
items: Real-time Order Management: Instant order routing to store managers with customer status notification
Store Manager App: Order status workflow (received/preparing/complete), sales dashboard, and operations overview

business.title: Payment & Settlement Logic
items: PG Integration & Auto-Settlement: End-to-end payment processing with per-store automated settlement logic
Refund Processing Workflow: Scenario-based cancellation and refund handling system

crou.details: CROU is a SaaS platform that systematically supports habit formation and goal achievement through a customizable routine engine. Users design their own routines, track progress via performance scores and statistics, and stay consistent with scheduled push notifications. This project includes native widget development and demonstrates full-cycle mobile SaaS capabilities.

routine.title: Customizable Routine Engine
items: Routine Customization: Category-based goal setting with repeat cycles, time slots, and detailed conditions
Template-Based Recommendations: Routine package suggestions tailored to user interests

motivation.title: Tracking & Motivation System
items: Performance Scores & Statistics: Daily, weekly, and monthly achievement rate visualization and reports
Scheduled Push Notification System: Automated notification scheduling based on routine start times

spiritual.title: Content & Widgets
items: Daily Content Delivery: Automated daily content distribution with bookmark and share features
Home Screen Widget: Native widget development for at-a-glance information without opening the app

chordly.details: Chordly is an expert matching social platform that combines multi-criteria matching algorithms, Instagram-style content feeds, and real-time direct messaging. The project covers the full spectrum of matching platform essentials: expert profile/portfolio systems, condition-based filtering and matching, feed-based content sharing, and 1:1 real-time messaging.

matching.title: Multi-Criteria Matching System
items: Condition-Based Matching: Multi-criteria matching logic based on field, expertise, and proficiency level
Expert Profile & Portfolio: Profile system centered on career history, specialization, and work samples

social.title: Social Networking & Real-Time Communication
items: Instagram-Style Content Feed: Photo, video, and media clip sharing with interaction features
Real-Time Direct Messaging: Chat-based 1:1 communication and post-match coordination

suwon-its-2025.details: An all-in-one mobile platform built for large-scale international event operations (2025 Suwon ITS Asia-Pacific Forum). The system integrates participant management for thousands of attendees, personalized scheduling, attendee networking, and real-time push notifications. This B2B/B2G project demonstrates the capability to deliver event platforms at scale.

schedule.title: Event Operations & Custom Scheduling
items: Program Guide: Large-scale event content management with session, speaker, and abstract details
Attendee Custom Schedule: Session bookmarking, personal agenda builder, and reminder integration

communication.title: Attendee Networking & Real-Time Notifications
items: Attendee Networking: On-site communication support via 1:1 and group chat
Real-Time Push System: Multi-purpose notification handling for schedule changes, urgent announcements, and reminders

koback.details: KOBACK is an EdTech learning management platform designed for three distinct user roles: students, parents, and coaches. The project integrates role-specific UX, learning journals with progress tracking dashboards, real-time communication features, and a payment system, covering the core elements of a multi-role platform end to end.

learning.title: Learning Progress Dashboard
items: Learning Journal: Structured learning record system with coach feedback and video analysis
Progress Tracking: Auto-generated individual development charts and reports

users.title: Three-Role Custom UX
items: Students: Profile management, assignment review, and learning status overview
Parents: Child growth record access, coach consultation, and tuition payment integration
Coaches: Class and attendance management, feedback uploads, and per-student progress tracking

ecommerce-platform.details: Full renewal of a food e-commerce platform with a large member base, building a three-sided platform for vendors, consumers, and administrators. Implemented PG payment gateway integration, automated settlement system, electronic tax invoice issuance, ERP integration, and inventory management. Built automation logic using MySQL Scheduler for auto-cancellation and event notifications.

commerce.title: Core Commerce System
items: PG payment integration with multiple payment methods and automated settlement
Electronic tax invoice auto-issuance and refund processing workflow

operations.title: Operational Automation
items: Product and inventory ERP integration, Excel API-based bulk data management
MySQL Scheduler-based automation: auto-cancellation, event notifications

platform.title: Three-Sided Platform
items: Vendor management: product listing, order management, sales analytics
Admin back-office: member management, coupons, full operations control

loan-matching.details: A fintech brokerage service that matches customers with optimal loan products by comparing conditions from multiple lenders. Developed loan limit and interest rate comparison services, along with application history tracking and progress notification systems.

matching.title: Loan Matching System
items: Customer loan criteria registration with automatic multi-lender comparison
Comparison service for loan limits, interest rates, and repayment terms

notification.title: Application Management & Notifications
items: Real-time loan application tracking and progress notifications
Auto-alerts for lender condition changes with re-comparison

e-signature.description: Contract management and e-signature B2B SaaS
e-signature.details: A B2B web service for contract creation, upload, and electronic signatures between parties. Developed document upload and e-signature APIs, administrator contract brokerage service, and step-by-step progress notification system for contract participants.

contract.title: E-Contract System
items: Document upload and e-signature API with multi-party signing workflow
Admin contract brokerage and contract status dashboard

workflow.title: Workflow Automation
items: Stage-based auto-notifications (signature request, completion, expiry)
Contract history management and audit logging

edtech-lms.description: Online lecture and live streaming education platform
edtech-lms.details: An education platform providing online lecture upload/management and live streaming services. Built real-time broadcasting system using OBS integration and AWS live streaming API, along with course material management. Supports both web and mobile applications.

streaming.title: Live Streaming
items: OBS integration with AWS live streaming API for real-time broadcasting
Viewer real-time participation and lecture recording/VOD conversion

management.title: Course Management System
items: Admin lecture upload and course material management (video, documents)
Student learning history tracking and completion management

teamTeaser.heading: Expert Team, from Planning to Launch

items.content: As an early-stage startup, our planning was uncertain, but the expert helped us think through our business model together. Thanks to this, we launched our MVP in just 3 weeks and secured initial investment.
items.author: CEO

items.content: Unlike other outsourcing companies, the code quality is exceptionally high. Our internal development team that took over praised it as 'an extremely maintainable structure.'
items.author: CTO

items.content: We were skeptical about Flutter's cross-platform performance, but it delivered native-like performance. We perfectly caught both iOS and Android with one codebase.
items.author: Project Manager
